testcase.name: testGenerateSuffixArray_LogicBased_ReversePredicate

failure.message: Logical branch for reverse suffix generation failed. ==> expected: not equal but was: <-1>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Logical branch for reverse suffix generation failed. ==> expected: not equal but was: <-1> at
